---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in current repository behavior or documentation
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Current behavior

What happened?

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen instead?

## Reproduction

Provide steps, commands, file paths, or screenshots if relevant.

## Scope note

Does this affect:

- [ ] bootstrap docs / repository support
- [ ] architecture or spec baseline docs
- [ ] examples
- [ ] implementation code

## Additional context

Add any other context here.

> If this may be a security issue, please follow `SECURITY.md` instead of filing a public bug report first.
